data.current_description: Create an ask data lens. Retired in API 3.22.
data.summary_suggestion: Create a new ask data lens
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new ask data lens for natural language querying. This endpoint is retired as of API 3.22 and should not be used for new implementations. Accepts AskDataLensInput containing lens configuration. Returns the created ask data lens object with a 201 Created status. Note: This functionality is no longer supported in current API versions.
data.reasoning: Original description is too minimal and lacks critical context. Added deprecation warning, input/output details, and status code information to help AI agents understand this is a legacy endpoint. Improved summary with 'new' for clarity.

message: Operation 'getaskdatalens' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description lacks essential details about parameters and return values. Added deprecation context, parameter requirements, and return information to improve AI agent interpretability and help agents understand this is a legacy endpoint.

data.current_description: Get ask data lens details. Retired in API 3.22.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve ask data lens details by ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about a specific ask data lens by its ID. This endpoint is retired as of API 3.22 and should not be used for new implementations. Requires the lens_id path parameter. Returns the ask data lens object containing configuration and metadata. Note: This functionality is no longer supported in current API versions.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks essential details about parameters and return values. Added deprecation context, parameter requirements, and return information to improve AI agent interpretability and help agents understand this is a legacy endpoint.

message: Operation 'deleteaskdatalens' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is insufficient for AI agent decision-making. Added deprecation warning, parameter requirements, side effects (permanent deletion), and status code information. Clarified that this is a destructive operation with permanent consequences.

data.current_description: Delete an ask data lens. Retired in API 3.22.
data.summary_suggestion: Delete an ask data lens by ID
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a specific ask data lens by its ID. This endpoint is retired as of API 3.22 and should not be used for new implementations. Requires the lens_id path parameter. Permanently removes the ask data lens and associated configurations. Returns a 204 No Content status on successful deletion. Note: This functionality is no longer supported in current API versions.
data.reasoning: Original description is insufficient for AI agent decision-making. Added deprecation warning, parameter requirements, side effects (permanent deletion), and status code information. Clarified that this is a destructive operation with permanent consequences.
